recommendations.title: Ibiza
recommendations.overview: A mature podiatrist, his girlfriend and her teenage children travel Ibiza to live a crazy holidays.

recommendations.title: Not Without My Shrink
recommendations.overview: A successful psychoanalyst's life is turned upside down by a very anxious and extremely clingy patient who starts dating his daughter.

recommendations.title: The Perfect Date
recommendations.overview: Michel dreams of a perfect meeting with the woman of his dreams, entirely due to chance, as his parents and grandparents experienced. Vincent, Michel's contrast, is completely different. He is more the man of the direct approach and he follows his...

recommendations.title: I Want to Eat Your Pancreas
recommendations.overview: After his classmate and crush is diagnosed with a pancreatic disease, an average high schooler sets out to make the most of her final days.

recommendations.title: Paper Moon
recommendations.overview: During the Great Depression, a con man finds himself saddled with a young girl who may or may not be his daughter, and the two forge an unlikely partnership.

recommendations.title: Bad Boys: Ride or Die
recommendations.overview: After their late former Captain is framed, Lowrey and Burnett try to clear his name, only to end up on the run themselves.

recommendations.title: Of Mice and Men
recommendations.overview: Two drifters, one a gentle but slow giant, try to make money working the fields during the Depression so they can fulfill their dreams.

recommendations.title: Live Twice, Love Once
recommendations.overview: A retired academic teacher tries to find the love of his youth after being diagnosed with Alzheimer's.

recommendations.title: Bring It On: All or Nothing
recommendations.overview: A transfer student at a rough high school tries joining the cheer-leading squad and finds that she not only has to face off against the head cheerleader, but also against her former school in preparation for a cheer-off competition.

recommendations.title: Tod@s Caen
recommendations.overview: A pair of seducers try to prove who has the best techniques while trying not to fall in love with each other.
